description: GCT USB4085-GF-A USB Type-C SMD receptacle, 16-pin + shield, bottom-mount — 5V power input only (no USB data required)
supply_voltage_range: VBUS: 4.75–5.25V (USB 2.0 500mA / USB 3.0 900mA / USB-C 1.5A or 3A with CC resistors)

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground (A side pin 1)

pins.name: TX1P
pins.description: USB 3.1 TX1+ — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: TX1N
pins.description: USB 3.1 TX1- — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: VBUS
pins.description: USB VBUS +5V. Connect to 5V rail via polyfuse.

pins.name: CC1
pins.description: Configuration Channel 1. Connect 5.1kΩ to GND for UFP/sink identification.

pins.name: DP1
pins.description: USB 2.0 D+ — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: DN1
pins.description: USB 2.0 D- — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: SBU1
pins.description: Sideband Use 1 — leave NC

pins.name: VBUS
pins.description: USB VBUS +5V (second VBUS pin). Connect to 5V rail.

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground (A side pin 12)

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground (B side pin 1)

pins.name: VBUS
pins.description: USB VBUS +5V (B side). Connect to 5V rail.

pins.name: CC2
pins.description: Configuration Channel 2. Connect 5.1kΩ to GND for UFP/sink identification.

pins.name: DP2
pins.description: USB 2.0 D+ (B side) — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: DN2
pins.description: USB 2.0 D- (B side) — leave NC for 5V-only use

pins.name: SBU2
pins.description: Sideband Use 2 — leave NC

pins.name: VBUS
pins.description: USB VBUS +5V (B9). Connect to 5V rail.

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground (B side pin 12)

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Shield/shell — solder to GND plane

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Shield/shell — solder to GND plane

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Shield/shell — solder to GND plane

pins.name: SHIELD
pins.description: Shield/shell — solder to GND plane

required_passives.reason: UFP sink identification (allows cable to carry up to 1.5A)
UFP sink identification (required on both CC pins)

notes: For 5V-only power input: connect all VBUS pins together to 5V rail via polyfuse. Connect CC1 and CC2 to GND via 5.1kΩ resistors (mandatory — without these, USB-C chargers may not provide power). Solder all shield tabs to GND for mechanical strength and EMC. D+/D- and SS pins left NC.
